text.autoconfig.mini-chat-translator.opt: Translation Engine
Choose the translation service to use\n§aLocal Model§r: Fully offline, requiring a 1.94GB model download for first use\n§eOnline Translation§r: Requires configuration of the corresponding API key
Baidu Translation APP ID
The APP ID applied for on the Baidu Translation Open Platform
Baidu Translation Secret Key
The secret key applied for on the Baidu Translation Open Platform
Tencent Cloud Secret ID
Secret ID obtained from Tencent Cloud Console
Tencent Cloud Secret Key
Secret Key obtained from Tencent Cloud Console
Alibaba Cloud API Key
API Key obtained from the Aliyun console
Auto download model
Automatically download the translation model (approximately 470MB) when first used
Model Path
Custom model storage path (leave blank to use default path)
Enable Translation
Enable or disable the translation function
Translate your own messages
Whether to translate messages received by yourself
Translate from Chinese to English and send
Translate the Chinese you want to send into English and send it out
